mean_cn: v.考虑，细想；认为，把...看作；把…看作
mean_en: to think about (something or someone) carefully especially in order to make a choice or decision
sentence: I will consider your offer, but I think I can find a better one.
sentence_trans: 我会考虑你给的职位，但我觉得我能找到一个更好的。
word_etyma: con有关 + sider星座 → 对星座的观察 → consider考虑
